gold.title: Google Drive Uploader Toast
gold.reason: Google Drive-style upload progress toast — visually rich and recognizable pattern that impresses in product demos.

gold.title: Save Changes Toast
gold.reason: Clerk.dev-style save changes toast with undo action — polished utility that demonstrates product maturity.

silver.title: Toast 1
silver.reason: Custom styled toast — clean visual enhancement over default toasts.

silver.title: Basic Toast
silver.reason: Accessible basic toast — solid baseline with good UX defaults.

bronze.title: Toast 1
bronze.reason: Base UI toast primitive — foundational but not visually impressive for website redesign.

bronze.title: Sonner
bronze.reason: Direct shadcn Sonner wrapper — widely used default, adds no visual differentiation.
